name: Pearl Barley Soup
intro: This is a very hearty soup, ideal for a warming lunch after a long morning’s skiing or working outdoors.

ingredients.item: eek, washed well and finely chopped
small celeriac, peeled and finely diced
itres good-quality chicken or vegetable stock
sea salt and ground black pepper

method: Heat the butter and oil in a saucepan. Add the onion and leek and cook gently for about 10 minutes. Now add the carrots, celery, celeriac, bay leaf and speck or bacon and turn the heat to medium. Cook for 10 more minutes, stirring from time to time. Add the stock, barley and potatoes and simmer gently for about 1 hour. Taste for salt and pepper and season.
Remove from the heat, add the cream and serve.
